navBarTitle.description: Navigation bar title 'UI Elements' — stable screen-loaded identifier

alertButton.description: Main content 'Alert' button (row 2) — triggers a native iOS alert. class_chain scopes to XCUIElementTypeButton so it does not collide with XCUIElementTypeAlert (same name) when the alert overlay is up.

uiElementsTab.description: Bottom tab bar: UI Elements tab. class_chain scopes to the tab bar so it does not collide with the nav bar title of the same name.

webViewTab.description: Bottom tab bar: Web View tab

nativeAlert.description: Native iOS alert overlay (XCUIElementTypeAlert). Used to assert the alert is visible. Dismiss via the alertOkButton or BaseScreen helper.

alertOkButton.description: The single 'OK' button inside the native iOS alert. Sample iOS app's alert has no Cancel button.
